prompt: How well is Trsr.Application tested? Anything in there that's totally untouched by tests?

assertions.text: Report provides a coverage percentage specifically for the Trsr.Application layer
Report lists at least one file in Trsr.Application with zero or near-zero coverage (if any exist)
Interpretation is focused on Trsr.Application — not dominated by other layers like Trsr.Api
Report mentions specific public types or services in Trsr.Application by name
Does not just paste the full table — surfaces the layer-specific signal
